notes: Chunk contains 1 event: 8-K Q2 2024 earnings press release (EX-99.1), accession 0001546417-24-000123, dated 2024-08-06. No fiscal_kpis in this chunk.
All 30 evidence quotes verified as exact substrings of the event content.

Skipped (14): guest_experience/value/digital-capabilities strategy talk (too vague); depreciation_and_amortization (ambiguous naming, glue-word 'and' vs standard-phrase rule); restaurant_openings ('opening' banned state word); hong_kong_restaurant_closures (single-instance bound; folded into asset_impairment_charges); risk-factor boilerplate items (consumer_confidence, food_safety, cybersecurity_breach, competition, weather/pandemic, goodwill_impairment risk mention, tax-law changes, supplier concentration); franchise_revenues (flat, no narrative attribution); convertible-note hedge/warrant dilution mechanics; tax valuation allowance detail; revenue_growth_management ('growth' banned; covered by strategic_initiative_fees).

Brand-level comps coined only where source emphasizes them (Outback Steakhouse flagship, Outback Brazil reported separately with FX/VAT adjustments); Carrabba's/Bonefish/Fleming's comps are covered by same_store_sales at company level.
commodity_costs and labor_costs share one evidence sentence per R2 split (two independent causal variables in one quote).
